artPrompt: Lore plate comic page, no text. Living Gateway Heart crystal-core in ancient sandstone ruins; soft cyan pulse; moss and earth dominant. Room at bottom for caption box. No painted words. Original Riftwilds IP only. NO dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, or UI in the image.

lines.text: Hearts were living cores. Stones are travel shards.
The Commons Riftstone is a fragment of the Prime — maps of places not yet found.
